name: IdsEdwMadorCovLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT t.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK, t.MBR_ID, t.SUB_ID, t.GRP_ID, t.PROD_ID, t.MBR_COV_EFF_DT, t.TAX_YR, t.SRC_SYS_CD, t.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, t.AS_OF_DTM, t.GRP_SK, t.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, t.MBR_SK, t.PROD_SK, t.SUB_SK, t.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD, t.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM, t.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD, t.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM, t.HSA_ACCT_IN, t.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN, t.TAX_YR, t.SRC_SYS_CD, t.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm}' as datetime) AS AS_OF_DTM, t.GRP_SK, t.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, t.MBR_SK, t.PROD_SK, t.SUB_SK, t.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD, t.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM, t.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD, t.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM, t.HSA_ACCT_IN, t.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN, t.MBR_COV_TERM_DT, t.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT, t.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_F AS target USING cte ON target.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK = cte.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.MBR_ID = cte.MBR_ID, target.SUB_ID = cte.SUB_ID, target.GRP_ID = cte.GRP_ID, target.PROD_ID = cte.PROD_ID, target.MBR_COV_EFF_DT = cte.MBR_COV_EFF_DT, target.TAX_YR = cte.TAX_YR, target.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD, target.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = cte.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, target.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, target.AS_OF_DTM = cte.AS_OF_DTM, target.GRP_SK = cte.GRP_SK, target.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = cte.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, target.MBR_SK = cte.MBR_SK, target.PROD_SK = cte.PROD_SK, target.SUB_SK = cte.SUB_SK, target.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD = cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD, target.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM = cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM, target.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD = cte.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD, target.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM = cte.PROD_CRBL_COV_NM, target.HSA_ACCT_IN = cte.HSA_ACCT_IN, target.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT = cte.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT, target.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = cte.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, target.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, target.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = cte.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, target.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK = cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK, target.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK = cte.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK, MBR_ID, SUB_ID, GRP_ID, PROD_ID, MBR_COV_EFF_DT, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, MBR_MA_DOR_SK, cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte.AS_OF_DTM, cte.GRP_SK, cte.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, cte.MBR_SK, cte.PROD_SK, cte.SUB_SK, cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD, cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM, cte.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD, cte.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT, cte.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT, cte.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK, cte.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK); MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_HIST_F AS target USING cte_hist ON target.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK = cte_hist.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK AND target.AS_OF_DTM = cte_hist.AS_OF_DTM WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.MBR_ID = cte_hist.MBR_ID, target.SUB_ID = cte_hist.SUB_ID, target.GRP_ID = cte_hist.GRP_ID, target.PROD_ID = cte_hist.PROD_ID, target.MBR_COV_EFF_DT = cte_hist.MBR_COV_EFF_DT, target.TAX_YR = cte_hist.TAX_YR, target.SRC_SYS_CD = cte_hist.SRC_SYS_CD, target.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = cte_hist.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, target.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = cte_hist.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, target.GRP_SK = cte_hist.GRP_SK, target.MBR_SK = cte_hist.MBR_SK, target.PROD_SK = cte_hist.PROD_SK, target.SUB_SK = INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT, INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT, INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK, PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK) VALUES
